title: Stat's
description: Add custom stats to your Minecraft server, making the game more riches and enjoyable such that every player can have their own different personality, some may invest in speed, some may invest in strength, what's your choice?
body:
Stat's is a cutting-edge Minecraft plugin designed to elevate gameplay through an intuitive stats and leveling system. This plugin introduces essential player attributes such as Health, Strength, Agility, and more, allowing players to personalize their characters and engage in a rewarding journey of continual improvement.

Key Features:

1.Stat Customization:

->Essential stats like Health, Strength, and Agility are at the core of character development.

->Players can allocate points to these stats, shaping their characters to suit specific playstyles.

->Stats directly influence player performance, adding strategic depth to encounters.

2.Leveling System:

->A dynamic leveling system rewards players for in-game activities.

->Experience points (XP) are earned through actions such as defeating mobs, completing quests, or exploring the world.

->Each level gained unlocks skill points, allowing players to enhance stats or unlock special abilities.

3.Mob-based Progression:

->Defeating mobs becomes a central aspect of character progression.

->Different mobs provide varying amounts of XP based on their difficulty level.

->Encourages players to explore diverse biomes and face tougher challenges for increased rewards.

commands to increase your stats:

/<stat> <player name> <amount to be set>
